lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner — used to plan the mining suite, ore racks and defensive fit.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Krait Mk II ship page — manufacturer specs, hardpoint count, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, optional-internal sizes, and module data behind the mining build.

sources.label: Inara — Krait Mk II
sources.what: Per-ship page: base stats, cargo capacity, price and outfitting reference for the miner.

sources.label: Fandom wiki
sources.what: Krait Mk II hull profile, internal layout and fighter-bay capability relevant to mining defence.
